title: FP32 FMA / Dot-Product RTL with 20%+ Area/Timing Improvement
description: Design fma_fp32_dot3: 3-stage pipeline FP32 fused multiply-add (Y=A+B*C) and dot-product (Y=Ps+Px*Dx+Py*Dy). Optimize area and timing to be >=20% better than reference baseline (~40,512 um2, 5,406 cells, slack +4.0~6.6ns at 20ns on SKY130 HD). Target: area < 32,410 um2, timing slack > +4.8ns at 20ns.

interfaces: dot_p_msb_i: explicit mantissa MSB for dot mode
constraints.latency: 3 cycles (valid_i sampled edge -> result at N+2 rising edge)
optimizations_applied: Removed dead pipeline registers (s2_mode, s3_mode, s2_dot_has_term3, s2_sign_eff)

acceptance_checks.description: Verify EDA tools and PDK are available
Spec completeness: all ports, modes, special values, rounding defined
RTL compiles with iverilog -g2012 -Wall without errors
Verilator or Icarus lint passes with no unreviewed warnings
NaN, Inf, Inf*0 special values correct
Dot product: multi-term, boundary, cancel, msb combinations
Yosys+ABC synthesis on SKY130 passes with stat report
Timing sweep 20/16/12/10/8ns with zero area penalty
Final report with area/timing comparison vs reference

done_when: Timing meets 16ns period (20% tighter) with zero area penalty
Final report exists with all evidence linked
metadata/run.json records all commands, artifacts, and failures
human_review_gates: Truncation of FP32 mantissa in multiplier (24x12) may affect precision for non-clean mantissa values
Product LSB truncation for INT_W=40 (8 bits lost) may affect rounding in edge cases
Dot product Q8.4 precision limited to dx_i[10:0] at 11 effective bits
